closed_since_c76.description: setupLighting comment read '5-source pass (degraded to 4 on low-end mobile)' — factually wrong (actual 6/5). Documentation drift.
closed_since_c76.fix_evidence: MerlinLairScene.ts line 660 now reads: '// ── Ambient Lighting — 6-source pass (degraded to 5 on low-end mobile) ── // C52: corrected count (was 5/4, actual 6/5)'. Matches header line 2 and runtime source count.

closed_since_c76.description: mg_herboristerie endGame() removed pointerdown but NOT keydown — asymmetric cleanup vs all 13 other minigames.
closed_since_c76.fix_evidence: mg_herboristerie.ts line 345: 'this.canvas?.removeEventListener(keydown, this.onKeyDown); // C52: symmetric with cleanup() — matches 13/13 other minigames'. GREP confirms 28 total occurrences (14 files × 2 = endGame + cleanup).

closed_since_c76.description: mg_negociation WCAG 2.4.7 — no keyboard focus indicator during empty word window (first ~0.6s before words scroll in).
closed_since_c76.fix_evidence: mg_negociation.ts lines 409-418: guard 'if (visibleForKb.length === 0 && document.activeElement === this.canvas)' renders '⌨ Prêt…' at canvas bottom. C52 comment confirms WCAG 2.4.7 intent.

flat_shading.evidence: All procedural materials (stone, wood, bone, candle, door, shelf, book, parchment, pedestal) retain flatShading:true. Crystal (lines 156-166) correctly omits flatShading with inline comment (C49). LairDensity.ts sM and all 5 bookMats have flatShading:true. LairGLBAssets.ts applies flatShading:true per-clone on bougie (line 138) and via applyFlatShading() on table_druidique (line 160). No regressions introduced.

z_fighting.evidence: mortarMat polygonOffset:true/factor:-1/units:-2 (MerlinLairScene.ts ~line 43). table_druidique GLB at Y=-5.0 adjacent to sol_pierre at Y=-4.98 — covered by polygonOffset factor:-2/units:-4 (LairGLBAssets.ts lines 163-170, C128). parchment rolls at Y=-4.8 (LairDensity.ts line 35) sit above the floor plane with no coplanarity risk.
z_fighting.problem: Score held at 9 (same as C76, no regression, no fix applied). sol_pierre GLB polygonOffset status not confirmed in this read range — risk remains on 16-bit depth GPUs (Mali-T720/Adreno 306). Not a regression since C76.

material_quality.evidence: pedestalMat: roughness=0.85, metalness=0.05, flatShading:true (line 155 C46). crystalMat: roughness=0.25, metalness=0.1, transparent/opacity=0.82, emissive=0x6030aa, emissiveIntensity=0.6 (lines 156-166 C49). stoneMat: roughness=0.95, metalness=0.0. LairDensity bookMats: roughness=0.8, metalness=0.0 across 5 variants. All PBR registers consistent with Celtic dungeon palette.

lighting_dramaturgy.evidence: setupLighting (lines 660-682): AmbientLight(0x1a1008,0.3) + HemisphereLight(0x2a3820,0x3a2a1a,0.25) + key PointLight(0xff6618,0.9) + rim PointLight(0x6699cc,0.55) + fill PointLight(0xcc8833,0.4) + backAccent PointLight(0xff5500,0.35 — skipped lowEnd) = 6 full / 5 low-end. LairDensity adds moonbeam SpotLight(0xb8d4ff,1.8) + optional biblio PointLight(0xffa040,0.6). setupLighting comment now correctly reads '6-source pass (degraded to 5 on low-end mobile)' — C52 BUG#1-C76 closed. Documentation now consistent with header line 2 and runtime.
lighting_dramaturgy.problem: None. C52 fix promotes this from 8→10. The previously docked 2 points (documentation drift hazard) are fully recovered.

glb_coverage.evidence: LairGLBAssets.ts covers: cauldron.glb (line ~90), bougie.glb ×3 clones (line 128), table_druidique.glb (line 156). Each loader has isDisposed guard (lines 99, 129, 157 — C81-03/C122/C133 annotations). Each loader has .catch() fallback preserving procedural mesh. cancelHandles collected and run on dispose. Bougie clones get independent material instances (C90-P1) preventing shared emissive state pollution.

geometric_proportions.evidence: Crystal sphere SphereGeometry(0.7,16,12) at line 176 — 192 faces confirmed (C51: upgraded from 8×6=48 for smooth silhouette without flatShading). Hit sphere (0.85,6,5) invisible, r+0.15 tolerance for raycasting. Cauldron body (0.65,10,8). Skull cranium (0.22,8,7). Pedestal CylinderGeometry(0.4,0.55,0.9,8). Parchment rolls CylinderGeometry(0.07,0.07,0.7,7). All proportions within Celtic-scale reference.

bundle_gzip.evidence: LairDensity.ts is a separate module (49 lines) extracted from MerlinLairScene.ts — code-split boundary maintained, correct per Cycle 34 mandate. 5 shared bookMat instances (C40) reduce WebGL state changes. LairGLBAssets.ts is a separate module. No new large imports detected in this read range. Minigames are individually loaded (14 files, each ~400-500 lines).
bundle_gzip.problem: Score held at 8 (same as C76 baseline — no new evidence of gzip regression or improvement). Bundle size not directly measurable from static read. Three.js treeshaking status and actual gzip delta vs C76 remain unverified without a build run.

fps_budget.evidence: LairDensity lowEnd guard skips biblio PointLight (line 39-43). setupLighting lowEnd guard skips backAccent PointLight (line 677). FPS hysteresis thresholds [45,52] (referenced in C76 baseline line 10, confirmed pattern). Bougie material cloning (3 instances) uses .clone() not instancing — 3 separate draw calls, acceptable for 3 candles. LairGLBAssets cancelHandles pattern prevents zombie animation frames on dispose.
fps_budget.problem: Score held at 9 (same as C76). Dynamic pixel ratio capped at 2 (line 688). No new high-cost geometry introduced. The bougie.glb ×3 draw-call pattern and non-instanced parchment rolls (×3) are the remaining budget risks on low-end Mali.

memory_leaks.evidence: LairDensity returns cleanup callback that removes world-space moon.target from scene (line 47) — SpotLight target would otherwise leak outside group.traverse() on dispose. LairGLBAssets isDisposed guards on all three loaders (lines 99, 129, 157) prevent scene mutation after dispose. cancelHandles array collected and drained on dispose (C97/C133). Per-clone material instances with explicit emissiveIntensity=0 baseline (C90-P1) prevent state leak between sessions.
memory_leaks.problem: None. Moon.target leak pattern (C35) confirmed fixed via return cleanup pattern.

feedback_zones.evidence: C76 baseline confirmed: 4 zones (Map/Crystal/Bookshelf/Door) with ZONE_ARIA_LABELS, ZONE_LORE, emissive hover, scale lerp 18*dt, ARIA live-region announcements. Crystal hitSphere (line 188-192) ensures zone remains raycast-active when crystal_ball.glb replaces visual sphere (C95 pattern). endGame paths across all 14 minigames have symmetric keydown removal (28 matches confirmed) — no orphaned listeners that could block zone interaction on return.

mobile_touch.evidence: renderer.domElement.style.touchAction = 'none' (line 695) prevents iOS scroll interference. lowEnd path reduces to 5 lights (backAccent skipped) and skips biblio PointLight — 4 total PointLights on low-end path within Mali-G57/Adreno 610 budget. Crystal hitSphere r=0.85 gives 17cm touch target at default camera distance — above 44px WCAG minimum equivalent. LairDensity parchment rolls at Y=-4.8 are decoration, not interactive.
mobile_touch.problem: Score held at 9 (same as C76). Pinch-zoom prevention not explicitly confirmed in this read. Hit target sizes for Map/Bookshelf/Door zones not re-verified this cycle.

keyboard_nav.evidence: ARIA role/tabindex/focus on canvas (lines 692-698 C85-01/C102). ARIA live-region (line 698+ C88). Auto-focus {preventScroll:true} (line 698). All 14 minigames now have symmetric keydown removal in both endGame() and cleanup() — 28 matches, 14 files (C52 BUG#2-C76 closed). mg_negociation renders '⌨ Prêt…' during empty word window (C52/C75 BUG#2-C75-CARRY closed). kbFocusIdx=-1 on endGame confirmed in C76 baseline (mg_runes line 274).
keyboard_nav.problem: None. All three keyboard/accessibility fixes from C75-C76 are confirmed closed.

scene_entry_flow.evidence: Entry cam cubic ease with dual sway (0.3/0.17Hz) confirmed in C76 baseline (line 10). Auto-focus canvas on mount (line 698 C102) means keyboard nav is live without requiring a prior click. ARIA label updates dynamically after interactives[] built (C38, line 693 comment). fadeInGLB 400ms on all three GLBs (lines 109, 145 C97/C133) — assets appear smoothly without pop-in.

hover_feedback.evidence: applyHoverTo with emissive.r>0 guard (C46) and instanceof Mesh guard (C76 baseline line 9). Scale lerp 18*dt. Crystal pulse intensity=2.2+sin(t*1.8)*0.4 (C76 baseline line 10). Cauldron GLB bodyMesh emissive bound via onCauldronGLBLoaded callback (LairGLBAssets lines 118-120) — hover works on GLB path too. Bougie clones have emissiveIntensity=0 baseline (C90-P1 line 137) preventing dirty state.

lore_coherence.evidence: ZONE_LORE references Cerridwen/Broceliande confirmed in C76 baseline. LairDensity moonbeam SpotLight(0xb8d4ff) positioned top-left entering at angle — consistent with forest-facing window established in LairWindow.ts. Parchment rolls on floor plane evoke a druid's workspace. Book spine colors (crimson/navy/forest/amber/purple) match Celtic manuscript palette. HemisphereLight sky=0x2a3820 (deep forest green-black) correctly contextualizes interior as Broceliande forest dwelling.

celtic_immersion.evidence: 6-light rig with warm ember key (0xff6618), cool moonbeam rim (0x6699cc), amber fill (0xcc8833), backAccent ember (0xff5500), forest HemisphereLight (0x2a3820/0x3a2a1a), dark warm ambient (0x1a1008). Crystal pulse + door flicker animation. Moonbeam shaft from LairDensity at angle from top-left. Stone flatShading throughout. Fog (referenced in imports line 5). Celtic zone lore. No regressions from C76.

bugs.description: sol_pierre GLB polygonOffset coverage unconfirmed. The GLB sits at Y=-4.98 adjacent to the procedural floor at Y=-5.0. table_druidique (same risk pattern) was fixed with polygonOffset in C128, but sol_pierre fix was not in the read range for this cycle.
bugs.recommendation: Confirm in LairGLBAssets.ts the sol_pierre loader applies polygonOffset factor:-2 / units:-4 in a traverse() pass, matching the table_druidique pattern (lines 163-170). If absent, add the guard. Risk is 16-bit depth GPUs (Mali-T720/Adreno 306) only.

bugs.description: Actual gzip bundle delta since C76 not measurable from static read. No build run executed. Three.js treeshaking coverage and minigame chunk sizes remain unverified this cycle.
bugs.recommendation: Run 'npm run build' in web-demo and compare dist/ gzip totals against C76 baseline. Flag if any single chunk exceeds 80 KB gzip.

top3_problems.issue: Gzip bundle size unverifiable from static read — no build run in audit scope. Potential Three.js treeshaking gaps.
top3_problems.action: Run npm run build, inspect dist/ chunk sizes.

top3_problems.issue: sol_pierre GLB polygonOffset status unconfirmed — residual risk on 16-bit depth GPUs.
top3_problems.action: Verify sol_pierre loader in LairGLBAssets.ts applies the same polygonOffset guard as table_druidique (C128 pattern).

top3_problems.issue: Bougie GLB ×3 separate draw calls (not instanced). 3 parchment roll meshes not instanced. Acceptable now but watch on Mali-G57 if scene density increases.
top3_problems.action: Monitor FPS telemetry on low-end path. Convert bougie to InstancedMesh if a 4th candle is added.

verdict_rationale: Global score 9.69/10 exceeds PROCEED threshold of 9.0. Delta +0.29 vs C76 (9.40). Zero regressions across all 16 criteria. All three C52 bugs verified closed: lighting comment corrected (8→10 on lighting_dramaturgy, the cycle's key improvement), mg_herboristerie keydown removal symmetric (28/28 matches confirmed), mg_negociation WCAG '⌨ Prêt…' indicator present. Two residual LOW bugs carried from C76 (sol_pierre polygonOffset, bundle gzip measurement) — neither blocks PROCEED at current severity.
